goal: Generate a valid governed benchmark plan for Typer and execute it end to end without planner fallback.
test_focus: planner backlog and launch ordering review
test_command:
python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
import tomllib
manifest = Path('pyproject.toml')
if not manifest.exists():
    raise SystemExit(1)
data = tomllib.loads(manifest.read_text())
project = data.get('project') or {}
name = project.get('name') or 'unknown'
print(name)
PY
coder_summary: Write a deterministic planner maturity marker file before repository review.
